understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously across multiple levels, using limited steps per level. Each level required moving all pieces to marked '+' cells, often needing piece swapping and coordinated pushing to get each piece onto a goal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifted the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Pushable objects (blocks) would be displaced if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls and boundaries blocked movement, but not always predictably—interaction was needed to discover which boundaries were passable or pushable. Multiple selectable pieces existed, and CLICK at a specific pixel coordinate switched control to another piece at that location. Some objects could be moved by pushing with the player or possibly with other objects.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously across multiple levels, using limited steps per level. Each level required moving all pieces to marked '+' cells, often needing piece swapping and coordinated pushing to get each piece onto a goal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifted the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Pushable objects (blocks) would be displaced if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls and boundaries blocked movement, but not always predictably—interaction was needed to discover which boundaries were passable or pushable. Multiple selectable pieces existed, and CLICK at a specific pixel coordinate switched control to another piece at that location. Some objects could be moved by pushing with the player or possibly with other objects.
